character.name: Create a clean 16-bit SNES-style pixel art character sprite of an adult male based on a 3D avatar. He has short brown hair, brown eyes, and a full brown beard. He wears a dark charcoal t-shirt with a simple gold chest emblem, blue jeans, and brown boots. Show him as a full-body sprite in a 3/4 standing pose facing slightly right, with relaxed arms and a calm friendly expression. Use consistent adult proportions, crisp pixel art edges, clean black outlines, subtle shading, and a plain light neutral background. No text, no scene, no props, no blur, no painterly style, no extra elements.
